title: Deterministic Preprocessing and Corpus Health
objective: Transform P003-validated literary text into deterministic, versioned, P006-ready whole-text counts; expose work independence, duplicate, overlap, edition, OCR, paratext, balance, and confound risks before calculation; and make a blocker-free, hash-bound P007 receipt the only public analysis-admission path without claiming automated corpus quality.
scope: A human-accepted, versioned Unicode surface-word preprocessing profile with raw and prepared digests
Direct private materialization of P003-validated TXT bytes and safe ZIP members into P005-owned prepare-only workspaces while P004 state remains payload-free
An additive P007 annotation overlay for analysis role, text-unit independence, parent work, OCR, paratext, and disclosed pre-upload curation
Exact-token optional custom exclusions that affect only candidate feature inventory
Known-independent-work-only candidate ranking with unknown projection after inventory freeze
Deterministic exact duplicate, near-duplicate, shared-passage, work-length, group-balance, minimum-data, feature-capacity, and metadata-confound checks
Closed blocker, strong-warning, and note semantics with no corpus-quality score
One expiring, one-time, hash-bound READY receipt as the sole public P006 input-building and enqueue authority
Beginner-first English Prepare and Health review screens with accessible visuals, semantic tables, CSV parity, and explicit interpretive limits
Content-free versioned preparation and health outputs, adversarial fixtures, deterministic reruns, clean-clone, Linux CI, and canonical-container evidence
non_goals: OCR correction, spelling correction, modernization, transliteration, accent stripping, translation, stopword removal, lemmatization, stemming, POS tagging, named-entity removal, or automatic paratext deletion
Analytical segmentation or treating chapters, excerpts, or repeated assets as independent works
Changing accepted P003 receipt schemas, P004 v1 inventory schemas, P005 lifecycle states, or P006 worker wire schemas
Public Upload-to-Run activation, Guided or Research parameter controls, browser end-to-end analysis, retry, or cancellation workflow, which belong to P008
Stylometric result graphics, interpretation cards, confidence-like labels, stability calibration, or open-set behavior, which belong to P009 and P011
Known-author accuracy, diachronic effect validation, benchmark thresholds, or complete leakage validation, which belong to P010 and P011
A complete FAIR-oriented run package, clean-room rerun, or reproducibility claim, which belongs to P012 and P015
Pinocchio, LiberLiber, De Amicis, Pavese, or any literary case-study result, which belongs to P013 or a later research ticket
Production resource limits, egress denial, container hardening, host isolation, swap or snapshot control, secure erasure, or deployment, which belongs to P014
A universal stylometric preprocessing standard, automated corpus-quality certification, representativeness claim, statistical confound control, authorship claim, or causal interpretation

acceptance.criterion: A separate HumanDecision accepts or revises the versioned preprocessing, severity, threshold, minimum-data, materialization, admission, output, and public-wording protocol before implementation fixtures or source code are frozen.

Closed configuration, annotation-overlay, preparation-manifest, corpus-health, and admission-receipt schemas plus canonical models reject malformed, duplicate-key, non-finite, inconsistent, unknown-field, and oversized inputs through separate structural and semantic validators.

P003-validated TXT and safe ZIP-member bytes are rebound to raw digest, P004 identity/rights/inventory state, and a capability-owned P005 private workspace without text, snippets, tokens, paths, or capabilities entering session state, SQLite control metadata, logs, exceptions, provenance, or browser HTML; every terminal path proves bounded cleanup.

Golden Unicode, BOM, newline, punctuation, number, symbol, combining-mark, apostrophe, hyphen, diacritic, and empty-output fixtures prove that identical accepted input and config produce byte-identical prepared text, prepared SHA-256, counts, manifests, and candidate inventories across repeated and canonical Linux runs.

Custom exclusions are exact-token and candidate-only; known independent works alone determine candidate order; changing unknown content leaves every known prepared artifact, candidate order, culling eligibility, and P006 fitting input exactly unchanged.

Exact duplicate, near-duplicate, shared-passage, segment/excerpt, parent-work, minimum-work, chronology-point, work-length, group-balance, and feature-capacity fixtures trigger exactly the predeclared blocker, strong-warning, note, or not-enough-features outcomes at and around every accepted boundary without exporting matching text.

Edition, OCR, paratext, genre, audience, source, adaptation, collection, chronology, and curation fixtures produce the expected purpose-aware confound matrix with no quality score, false clean-corpus verdict, or claim that warnings statistically control confounds.

Only an unexpired, one-time, blocker-free, hash-consistent READY receipt can build P006 input or enqueue analysis; direct, reused, expired, blocked, role-mutated, inventory-mutated, count-mutated, or lower-level bypass attempts fail closed while existing P005 and P006 contracts remain compatible.

Upload, Describe, Prepare, and Health review present beginner-first English copy, accessible blocker recovery, length/transformation/confound/overlap/feature-capacity visuals bound to semantic tables and CSV, mobile/reflow and keyboard behavior, no payload echo or egress, and explicit statements of what each diagnostic does not establish.

Full source, schema, provenance, privacy-canary, adversarial method, exact-commit clean-clone, Linux CI, SBOM/dependency/secret, canonical-container, and retained checksum gates pass at full measured source coverage while P008-P015 claims remain explicitly locked.

changed_files: P007 execution brief, native PromptEvent, four-lens architecture/method audit, detailed proposed preprocessing and corpus-health contract, proposed ADR, active Ticket, checkpoint, and synchronized startup/claim/threat pointers
Exact opening commit 196c5df passed Linux source, schema, provenance, SBOM/dependency/secret, and canonical-container gates; the result is retained without widening P007 claims

HD-20260714-0001 accepted the bounded P007 method package; HD-20260714-0002 accepted the 2026-07-17 Public-alpha target and August evidence-dependent manuscript-draft target; ADR-0014 and ADR-0015 preserve the separate claim boundaries

Commit 83a6eca added five closed P007 schemas, strict structural and semantic parsers, deterministic delta-surface-words-v1 preparation, known-only candidate ranking, content-free corpus-health assessment, and 100% measured source and branch coverage

commands.result: Before P007 edits, the P006-merged baseline passed 1,246 tests with one documented macOS canonical-worker skip, 100% of 7,768 statements and 2,080 branches, strict typing, metadata, 85 provenance records, repository scanning, frozen P006 evidence validators, and the locked R boundary.

The complete P007 proposed opening package passed 1,246 tests with one documented macOS canonical-worker skip, 100% of 7,768 statements and 2,080 branches, strict typing, metadata, 87 provenance records, repository scanning, frozen P006 evidence validators, and the locked R boundary; no production source or scientific fixture changed.

Exact P007 opening commit 196c5df passed pinned Linux source verification, full measured coverage, metadata, schemas, 87 provenance records, frozen P006 validators, SBOM/dependency/secret gates, and canonical Linux amd64 container construction.

The P007 pure-core source passed 1,294 tests with one documented macOS Linux-only skip and measured 8,496 statements and 2,286 branches at 100% coverage; format, lint, strict typing, and generated-schema drift checks also passed.

Exact commit 83a6eca passed all 1,295 tests on Linux at 100% measured statement and branch coverage, validated 91 provenance records, passed repository/R/SBOM/dependency/secret gates, and built the canonical Linux amd64 image.
